blended.narrative: White Pass is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,076 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 49.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 24" over the past week. Current depth: 75".
